title: podman pull output verbose when requested image is not found.
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**: /kind bug **Description** When pulling an invalid image, the output is rather verbose and could be a lot more concise. **Steps to reproduce the issue:** 1. Remove docker.io from /etc/containers/registries.conf 2. podman pull alpine **Describe the results you received:** ``` # podman pull alpine Trying to pull registry.access.redhat.com/alpine:latest...Failed Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/alpine:latest...Failed Trying to pull quay.io/alpine:latest...Failed error pulling image "alpine": unable to pull alpine: error pulling image from: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://quay.io/alpine:latest: Error reading manifest latest in quay.io/alpine: error parsing HTTP 404 response body: invalid character '<' looking for beginning of value: "\n404 Not Found\n

Not Found

\n

The requested URL was not found on the server. If you entered the URL manually please check your spelling and try again.

\n" ``` **Describe the results you expected:** An error similar to what Buildah returns in this same situation. ``` # buildah from alpine no such image "alpine" in registry: image not known ``` **Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):** **Output of `podman version`:** ``` # podman version Version: 0.5.1-dev Go Version: go1.9.5 OS/Arch: linux/amd64 ``` **Output of `podman info`:** ``` # podman info host: MemFree: 579870720 MemTotal: 2089639936 SwapFree: 2147479552 SwapTotal: 2147479552 arch: amd64 cpus: 1 hostname: localhost.localdomain kernel: 4.15.10-300.fc27.x86_64 os: linux uptime: 7h 11m 2.48s (Approximately 0.29 days) insecure registries: registries: [] registries: registries: - registry.access.redhat.com - registry.fedoraproject.org - quay.io - docker.io store: ContainerStore: number: 1 GraphDriverName: overlay GraphOptions: - overlay.override_kernel_check=true GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage GraphStatus: Backing Filesystem: xfs Native Overlay Diff: "true" Supports d_type: "true" ImageStore: number: 1 RunRoot: /var/run/containers/storage ```

comments.body:
This is fixed in master

```
$ sudo podman pull alpine
error pulling image "alpine": unable to pull alpine: image name provided is a short name and no search registries are defined in /etc/containers/registries.conf.
```
